name: wilson-prefs
description: User preferences (reply language / code language / response style) settable via the /wilson-prefs:prefs slash command, persisted to plugin data, and injected into context. SessionStart injects the full `## Prefs` block including the style file body; UserPromptSubmit re-asserts only the compact directive lines (no multi-KB body) so a long session does not bloat the prompt. Standalone port of wilson's prefs plugin.
